productDisplayName: Puma Men V.11 Cat Midnight Navy Tshirts
description: Composition Navy blue round neck jersey made of 100% polyester, has short sleeves, mesh panelling on the sides, branding on left chest, graphic print on the front and rubber print above the hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine was cold Wash separately Do not use softeners, bleach, iron or dry clean Do not allow to lay on itself when wet Line dry German brand puma specialises in minimalism and simplicity. This jersey from puma is the kind you can't have enough of. This stylish piece is an off-duty must have, pair it with fitted denims and bright canvas shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
